summary: Short customer testimonial from Roxane (Quebec) whose barefoot mare loved her Cavallo Hoof Boots so much she resisted having them removed, now moving faster on trail and in competition.
Announcement of Cavallo's sponsorship of the Horse Radio Network's 3rd Annual 12-Hour Holiday Radiothon, with over $4,000 in equine prizes, guest hosts, and listening details.
Recap of Cavallo sponsoring the PATH (Professional Association of Therapeutic Horsemanship) 2017 conference, covering therapeutic riding for PTSD, abuse, and autism, and the awards luncheon.
Opinion essay on horse welfare and the growing divide between owners who shoe their horses and those who use hoof boots, framing the boot-vs-shoe debate around animal care.
Story about a viral Christmas video from barefoot horsewoman Emma Massingale featuring miniature horses Ernie and Albert receiving Cavallo CLB (Cute Little Boots), which gained over a million views.
Brand blog post drawing an analogy between the rise of electric cars (Tesla, $90B automaker investment) and the adoption of Cavallo Hoof Boots over traditional shoeing.
Part 1 of a seasonal care series on helping horses transition between seasons, focused on physical protection, adequate shelter, and avoiding 'learned helplessness' from too much stall confinement.
Part 2 of the seasonal care series covering food and medicine: matching feed to a horse's age and activity, natural remedies over pharmaceuticals, worming timing, and probiotics.
Part 3 of the seasonal care series on equine dental care, warning that power-tool teeth floating can over-shave horses' teeth, which only grow a few inches over a lifetime.
Part 4 of the seasonal care series arguing horses need hoof protection when ridden on unfamiliar gravel or asphalt under rider weight, and that metal shoes fail to protect soles or absorb shock.
Post sharing a fan letter from cardiologist Dr. Jim Dwyer, a longtime Cavallo Trek boot user and trail rider in Arizona, alongside women's heart-health awareness messaging.
Chinese New Year (Year of the Dog) reflection from Cavallo tying canine traits of loyalty, integrity, and trust to the brand's values and encouraging owners to try hoof boots over shoeing.
